a:T5405,<div class="specification">
<p>Stephen was invited to perform a piano recital. In preparation for the event, Stephen recorded the amount of time, in minutes, that he rehearsed each day for the piano recital.</p>
<p>Stephen rehearsed for <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mn>32</mn></math> days and data for all these days is displayed in the following box-and-whisker diagram.</p>
<p><img height="256" src="data:image/png;base64," style="margin-right: auto; margin-left: auto; display: block;" width="488"/></p>
</div><div class="specification">
<p>Stephen states that he rehearsed on each of the <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mn>32</mn></math> days.</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Write down the median rehearsal time.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State whether Stephen is correct. Give a reason for your answer.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>On <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mi>k</mi></math> days, Stephen practiced exactly <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mn>24</mn></math> minutes.</p>
<p>Find the possible values of <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mi>k</mi></math>.</p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>b:T732,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mn>42</mn></math> (minutes)       <em><strong>(A1)     (C1)</strong></em></p>
<p><em><strong><span class="mjpage">[1 mark]</span></strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>Stephen is correct.      <em><strong>(A1)     </strong></em></p>
<p><span class="mjpage">     the minimum rehearsal time is greater than zero       <em><strong>(R1)</strong></em><br/></span></p>
<p><span class="mjpage"><em><strong>     OR</strong></em><br/></span></p>
<p><span class="mjpage">     he rehearsed at least <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mn>20</mn></math> minutes every day        <em><strong>(R1) (C2)</strong></em><br/></span></p>
<p><span class="mjpage"><strong>Note:</strong> Do not award <em><strong>(A1)(R0)</strong></em>. Accept equivalent reasoning based on the box-and-whisker diagram.</span></p>
<p><em><strong><span class="mjpage">[2 marks]</span></strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mn>0</mn><mo>,</mo><mo> </mo><mn>2</mn><mo>,</mo><mo> </mo><mn>3</mn><mo>,</mo><mo> </mo><mn>4</mn><mo>,</mo><mo> </mo><mo>…</mo><mo> </mo><mo>,</mo><mo> </mo><mn>15</mn></math>       <em><strong>(A1)(A1)(A1)     (C3)</strong></em></p>
<p><strong>Note:</strong> Award <em><strong>(A1)(A1)</strong></em> for each correct endpoint of the interval, <em><strong>(A1)</strong></em> for indication of integer values, except 1, between <em>their</em> endpoints.</p>
<p><em><strong><span class="mjpage">[3 marks]</span></strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/maths/topic/4/","children":["← back to ","maths"," topic ","4"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19N.1.SL.TZ0.T_15"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"maths"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"AI"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","sl-4-2-histograms-cf-graphs-box-plots"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
